HERMES_CHAT_IMAGE.description: Image tag for Solilos's stateless chat proxy. Leave default unless you're running a fork PoC.

HERMES_CHAT_PORT.description: Host loopback port the chat proxy binds on. NPM proxies the public `chat.<publicDomain>` down to this port behind Authelia forward-auth. Default 8787; pick something else only if it's taken. NB: the servicebay.healthcheck annotation uses the literal 8787 — change it there too if you change this.

HERMES_CHAT_SUBDOMAIN.description: Subdomain for the chat surface. `chat` matches what the household stack already points at (#1044); keeping it the same so existing bookmarks / family-portal links don't break. Authelia forward-auth gates every request before it lands on the chat proxy, which then folds the Remote-User identity into the Hermes uid (no second login).

HERMES_API_PORT.description: Port the ServiceBay `hermes` template's API server listens on (its `HERMES_API_PORT`). Default `8642` matches that template's default. The chat proxy reaches Hermes at `http://127.0.0.1:<this>` via host loopback (both pods are hostNetwork).

HERMES_API_KEY.description: Bearer token the chat proxy presents when calling Hermes' native session API. Held server-side only — never sent to the browser. Surfaced as `__SB_CREDENTIAL__` by the ServiceBay `hermes` template's post-deploy; paste that value here (same name on both sides to avoid lookup confusion).

CONFIG_AGENT_URL.description: URL of the config sidecar running in the hermes pod (host loopback; both pods are hostNetwork). The panel proxies admin soul/model edits here because the chat pod can't write Hermes' own data dir. Must match the hermes template's CONFIG_AGENT_PORT (default 8650).

CONTEXT_WINDOW.description: Model context window in tokens, shown by the chat's /context command. Match the ollama template's OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH (default 131072).

LOGOUT_URL.description: Optional logout URL shown in the chat sidebar footer (e.g. your Authelia logout endpoint like https://auth.<domain>/logout). Leave empty to hide the logout link.

DEFAULT_UID.description: Hermes uid used when the Authelia `Remote-User` header is absent (e.g. direct loopback access for offline testing). Normal requests through NPM+Authelia carry the header and key off the SSO identity instead.

TZ.description: IANA time zone for log timestamps.
